programme.title: Timecop
programme.desc: Max Walker, an officer for a security agency that regulates time travel, must fend for his life against a shady politician who's intent on changing the past to control the future.

programme.title: Double Team
programme.desc: Action superstar Jean-Claude Van Damme joins forces with NBA and media sensation Dennis Rodman in this action-packed thriller. Top counter-terrorist Jack Quinn is ready to get out of the spy game until the evil Stavros kidnaps his wife and unborn son.

programme.title: Legionnaire
programme.desc: Alain is a boxer in 1925 Marseille, France. When he doesn't take the dive paid to take by a mob boss, he has to split. He joins the Foreign Legion and is sent to Morocco. He makes 3 friends and they watch each other's backs.

programme.title: Second in Command (Samuel Goldwyn)
programme.desc: The new military attache is also second in command at the US embassy in "Moldavia". The loser at the recent presidential election isn't letting that stop him. The president seeks protection at the US embassy bringing it under attack.

programme.title: The Bouncer
programme.desc: English & French w/English Subtitles. After an altercation leaves a bodyguard in jail, he must infiltrate a dangerous gang to secure his freedom and the custody of his daughter.

programme.title: The Man From Nowhere
programme.desc: A quiet pawnshop keeper with a violent past takes on a drug-and-organ trafficking ring in hope of saving the child who is his only friend.

programme.title: Triple Threat
programme.desc: This breakneck thriller teams over half a dozen of the world’s biggest action stars for the martial arts event film of the year. When a hit is taken out on a billionaire’s daughter, it’s mercenaries versus assassins in an all-out war.

programme.title: Ong Bak
programme.desc: Raised by monks who taught him the Thai martial art of Muay Thai, Ting (Tony Jaa) is sent to Bangkok to retrieve the stolen head of the town's statue of the Buddha.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Filadelfia, Pensilvania, para visitar Hot Potato Cafe. Encuentra a un dueño agotado por la pasión que ha creado un ambiente tóxico lleno de negatividad.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ramsay descubre que el restaurante mexicano Mama Rita's sufre de una cocina desorganizada. Mientras tanto, la dueña puede tener que sacrificar una amistad para salvar su negocio.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay encuentra una segunda ubicación fallida de un restaurante familiar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Lido di Manhattan, un local italiano con una cocina antiestética y un propietario sin experiencia. Está tan horrorizado que cierra el lugar temporalmente.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por un restaurante francés y descubre que él y el jefe de cocina tienen una formación culinaria similar. Sin embargo, el chef niega la mala calidad de la comida de su restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Anna Vincenzo's, un restaurante familiar en Boca Raton, Florida. Se entera de que el obstinado dueño no acepta el cambio. Después de que se ignoran sus ideas, Ramsay se marcha.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Fleming, un restaurante danés en Miami. El obstinado dueño no quiere actualizar el lugar y Ramsay descubre algo en la hielera que lo lleva a cerrar el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita el Pabellón Español en Nueva Jersey. Descubre que un par de hermanos en disputa están llevando el restaurante al suelo. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Viajando al North End de Boston, el chef Ramsay pasa una semana en Davide, un restaurante italiano mal administrado por hermanos enemistados. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was later found guilty in the slaying.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, when off-duty Maine State Trooper Vicky Gardner is attacked by Steven Fortin during a routine stop, it triggers a chain of events which jumpstart a stalled murder case in New Jersey.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Virginia Beach police arrive at the Makdessi apartment to find the bloodied bodies of Elise Makdessi and Navy sailor Quincy Brown. But was Brown Elise's lover or her assailant?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Sonic X: Little Chao Lost
programme.desc: Sonic and his friends are at a camp site where they discover a Chao colony. Meanwhile, Dr. Eggman is also hiking nearby and decides to launch an attack when he encounters Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic X: Emerald Anniversary
programme.desc: Chris' father Nelson purchases a ring made from a Chaos Emerald for his wife Lindsey. Being made aware of its presence, Dr. Eggman attempts to snatch the emerald away from them.

programme.title: Sonic X: How to Catch a Hedgehog
programme.desc: After an encounter with Dr. Eggman, Sonic finds himself unable to stop running. Chris and his grandfather Chuck soon discover that Eggman's E-88 is behind Sonic's problem.

programme.title: Sonic X: A Dastardly Deed
programme.desc: Chris finds himself depressed at the prospect of his friends returning to their home world despite knowing that it is what's best for them. Meanwhile, Knuckles attempts to orchestrate a truce between Sonic and Eggman so that they can all return home.

programme.title: Sonic X: Countdown to Chaos
programme.desc: Eggman takes Chris hostage after tricking Knuckles and Chris into giving him all six Chaos Emeralds discovered. Eggman and Sonic face off once more as Sonic seeks to save Chris and prevent Eggman from obtaining the final Emerald.

programme.title: Sonic X: The Last Resort
programme.desc: After Chris, Amy, Cream and Cheese arrive at a resort, Eggman appears and tries to take over with his E-39 but Sonic arrives and tries to stop him. However Sonic is unable to swim, and the robot tries to drag him into the ocean!

programme.title: Sonic X: Unfair Ball
programme.desc: It's Team Sonic vs Team Eggman in a game of baseball for a Chaos Emerald! Team Sonic falls behind at first but then wins with a Sonic super-play, only to have Eggman to cheat and try to steal the Emerald regardless!

programme.title: Sonic X: Fly Spy
programme.desc: The President plants a fake emerald to try and attract Sonic but Rouge takes the bait instead. She winds up being hired by the Government to search inside Eggman's base with another agent, Topaz.

programme.title: Sonic X: Beating Eggman Part 1
programme.desc: Tails and Chris discover the third Chaos Emerald in a field and fly for it in the X-Tornado, but Eggman and E-51 catch up and trap them! Meanwhile, Rouge and Topaz launch an attack on Eggman's base.

programme.title: Sonic X: Beating Eggman Part 2
programme.desc: Sonic saves Tails and Chris from E-51 while Eggman makes off with the Chaos Emerald. At Eggman's base, Knuckles appears and helps Rouge plant explosives but they end up being trapped!

programme.title: Sonic X: That's What Friends Are for
programme.desc: Sonic decides to take his new friend Helen to pick flowers instead of attending the President's party he was invited to. The President's aide responds by sending a military unit to capture Sonic!

programme.title: Sonic X: Skirmish in the Sky
programme.desc: Rising from the rubble of his former base, Dr. Eggman reveals his new battleship, the Egg Fort, and attacks Station Square. Sonic faces off his nemesis once again on X-Tornado.

programme.title: Sonic X: Depths of Danger
programme.desc: The President demands the search for Dr. Eggman after Sonic destroys the Egg Fort. Meanwhile, Sonic and his friends are taking a well-deserved vacation where they discover that another Chaos Emerald is nearby.

programme.title: Sonic X: The Adventures of Knuckles and Hawk
programme.desc: Knuckles rescues a man named Hawk from ancient ruins. Discovering later that Hawk had discovered a chaos emerald, Knuckles seeks for him once again in Oriental City.

programme.title: Sonic X: The Dam Scam

programme.title: Sonic X: Sonic's Scream Test

programme.desc: Anne Heche and Tate Donovan star in an adaptation of Luanne Rice's Christmas tale about a widower who finds love in New York City. From the Hallmark Hall of Fame Collection.

programme.title: El amor llama a tu puerta
programme.desc: Eric Randall, autor de libros sobre el estilo de vida para solteros, es el encargado de su sobrina y sobrino durante las fiestas. Eric recurre a su amiga April, que ama la Navidad y le pide ayuda. Sus protagonistas son Jesse Metcalfe y Fiona Gublemann.

programme.title: Escríbeme en Navidad
programme.desc: Jessica envía tarjetas de Navidad a aquellos quienes son especiales para ella; la tía que la crió, su hermano, una estrella del pop que envejece, la maestra que la inspiró, y su amiga que siempre dice la verdad.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork's attempt to lock up his emotions backfires and each of his emotions boils to the surface.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork gets a pet caterpillar; Exidor begins preaching about reincarnation.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: After ruining Fred and Mindy's night, Mork decides he wants to go back to Ork, so Orson shows him what the McConnells' lives would have been like if Mork had never arrived on Earth.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork becomes so hopelessly addicted to advertisements that they invade his dreams.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley befriends a German Shepard at the kennel when its abusive owner claims he's a mad dog. Finding out all unadopted and unclaimed dogs are killed, she and Laverne have a sit-in. Can their efforts save him and all the other dogs?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Frank DeFazio loses some of his Christmas spirit when he has to cancel his yearly gathering for the homeless and poor. The girls and friends step in to help him keep the holiday meaningful for the less fortunate.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: As Shirley goes back for a grocery item, Laverne's at the checkout line, winning a shopping spree. Shirley feels jealous of her, but soon Laverne sees she's forgotten her friend. The two then team up for an all-out 5 minute, Supermarket Sweep.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley and her brother think she's adopted as she doesn't resemble any Feeneys. Later at the hospital where Shirley was born the girls try to get the truth by accessing a private file room in disguise. Is Shirley not a true Feeney female?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne shows Lenny a kindness and then gives him a kiss. Lenny now feels he loves her, and she's now his. No one can get through to him that this isn't the case, but Laverne hopes to let him down easy without completely breaking his heart.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: A small fire in the girls' bedroom becomes the start of a rift between them. Both girls become smitten with one of the handsome firemen that show up. Who will warm his heart and whose hopes will be extinguished?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: All are baffled by a woman's interest in Squiggy as a boyfriend. He loves her like crazy. She's able to make her every whim his command. Can Squiggy be woken up to see she's only using him?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls contact a building inspector to help Edna fix all the problems in their building...but Edna's later mad at them. She's got a short time to get up to code or face a huge fine. Will Edna abandon the girls and tenants in her anger?

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork decides to become a priest.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork foolishly picks a fight with Mindy in order to "kiss and make up.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork and Mindy compete to earn a job working for Nelson.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: As Mindy prepares a formal party for Nelson, Mork discovers he's become allergic to Mindy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork instills human emotions in a robot.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Kathy drags Mork home for an evening and later announces that she's pregnant with his child.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley starts seeing an older rich gentleman. His snobby family thinks that she only wants his money and couldn't possibly like him for any other reason. Will they let her prove she's not a 'gold digger' or simply stand on their assumptions?

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy is bursting to ask Ty about the engagement ring, but a couple of runaways throw everything into turmoil. Lou and Peter must cope with the money pit that the Hanley Farm renovation has become.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty struggles to deal with the fact that Amy has found the engagement ring and has to decide whether he is going to propose to her or not.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim hopes for a big commission when he helps a wealthy weekend cowboy look for his dream ranch. Meanwhile, Amy is stuck teaching his trophy wife how to ride.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy tries to fulfill Mallory's dream of being a showjumper but discovers that Georgie is the one with natural talent. Lou leaves for New York. Miranda and Tim hook up. Ty studies for his finals.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Janice brings Cisco Kid (and her emotional baggage) to Heartland. Amy tries to figure out why Cisco's lost that winning feeling. Georgie and Mallory try to rescue a stray dog from a well.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy seeks out an up-and-coming show jumper, Jeremy Hughes, to learn why he's refusing Scott and Ty's suggested treatment for his horse, Buckingham.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Chase Powers returns to Heartland with his wife Hayley, an aspiring liberty horse rider who wants Amy to be her coach. Lou comes home and quits her job.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Ty needs some engine parts for his broken-down truck, he's forced to turn to the last person on earth he wants help from his stepfather, Wade.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A trip to help out an old friend at a fishing camp doesn't go as planned, and a series of unexpected events elevate it to a life-changing weekend for the entire family.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty return from their trip to find everyone reeling from the devastating fire at Lou and Peter's home.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jeremy forces Amy to make a tough decision about Phoenix when his horse, Buckingham, sustains a serious injury that threatens his jumping career.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A local horse show is canceled and Lou saves the day by stepping up to host it at Heartland. Amy trains Georgie to take on an entitled brat from school, while Mallory's crush on her coach heightens.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Scott discovers that Spartan has a broken leg and Amy is forced to make the toughest decision of her life.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty's future as a vet is in serious jeopardy when he's blamed for a shocking fatality at Scott's clinic. Amy is determined to help Ty get to the bottom of what really happened and save his career.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos compiten para hacer la mayor cantidad posible de pasta para la cena de la noche, y un accidente en la cocina lleva a un competidor al hospital.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío para los once Chefs restantes: hacer una pizza gourmet. Los ganadores disfrutan de hamburguesas gourmet en Santa Bárbara mientras los perdedores preparan la cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los diez Chefs restantes complazcan a una adolescente exigente que vino a Hell's Kitchen para celebrar su fiesta de cumpleaños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay hace que los nueve Chefs restantes se sometan a una prueba de sabor con los ojos vendados. Los ganadores pueden ir a un spa; los perdedores deben limpiar la habitación.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When Oswald and Lewis want to sneak into the petting zoo, Kellie objects before initiating a heist of her own.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew plans to get married forever on his next birthday - now all he needs is a bride.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew's mother tries to help Drew search for a wife by introducing him to Amy.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew's life gets complicated when Steve asks him to hide his infidelity from Mimi.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew's former co-worker Larry is now a successful matchmaker and offers to find Drew a bride.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew becomes enamored with Dawn, but when he meets her adoring ex-boyfriends, Drew wonders how to stand out.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When his bosses terminate the other internal expediting analyst, Drew is finally forced to do his job.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: While taking salsa lessons, Drew finds himself attracted to his dance teacher, Maria.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Just as Drew is about to tell Kellie he wants to date, her repentant ex-husband Daryl arrives.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: After Oswald fails his nursing examination, Drew reluctantly offers Oswald a job - with disastrous results.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When Drew's bosses offer him money to perform in a Super Bowl commercial, Drew must overcome his stage fright.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When Larry tells Drew he's too physically unfit for an upcoming singles event, Drew vows to stop eating.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: After Drew complains about his coworker Traylor's high salary, Drew's bosses suggest he learn about computers.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew becomes attracted to a bisexual woman, Teri, who is also dating Drew's longtime friend Elaine.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: It's Kellie's birthday, but Drew just spent money on an engagement ring, so he can't pay for her celebration.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: After Drew complains about taking the bus to work every day, one of his bosses gives him a Rolls Royce.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew brings his beloved dog Speedy to a hospital in the hopes of cheering up a dying woman, Natalie.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Lewis and Oswald find the Christmas mugs they made Drew in a thrift store and set out to prank him as revenge.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: As Drew's self-imposed deadline to find a bride nears, Lewis and Oswald place ads on each bottle of Buzz Beer.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew's new girlfriend Lily moves in with him, but Drew has a hard time coping with her sleeping habits.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew wants to propose to Lily, but Kellie suggests Drew let Lily see what he's really like before proposing.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Lily's mother learns about Drew's previous marriages and wants to cancel Drew and Lily's wedding.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: After Lily left Drew at the altar, he realized Kellie was his true love - but Drew can't get Kellie to commit.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew goes to extremes while coaching his nephew Gus in soccer, but Gus's aggressive play scares his teammates.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew's fun work environment worsens after his relaxed boss Evan leaves for a yoga retreat.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew and Kellie reach a milestone in their relationship when they exchange house keys.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When Kellie makes a big announcement, Drew becomes even more determined to convince Kellie to commit.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When Drew's dad dies, Drew is devastated, but he's even more upset after reading his late father's journal.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: As Drew and Kellie worry about their impending parenthood, Drew, Lewis, and Oswald go on a drinking tour.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew feels he can no longer control his nephew Gus's behavior, as Kellie fears Drew won't make a good father.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Kellie can't drink alcohol while pregnant, so Drew promises to stop, but that proves difficult.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Kellie feels sorry for a lonely couple who just moved in and insists Drew become friends with the husband.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew wants to give Kellie her dream vacation to Italy, but he only has $1,000 for the trip.

programme.title: Homemade Christmas
programme.desc: A woman must choose between two men during the holidays. One is the man of her dreams, while the other one is Mr. Right.

programme.title: Delivering Christmas
programme.desc: After a young girl tells her mailman that her mother is sad, he decides to bring surprise gifts to the mother to remind her of the Twelve Days of Christmas.

programme.title: Saying Yes to Christmas
programme.desc: A magical Christmas wish makes a career-obsessed woman say "yes" to every invitation while she's home for the holidays. However, past feelings get reignited when an old flame joins her hectic schedule of yuletide activities.

programme.title: A Family for the Holidays
programme.desc: Ian plans what he thinks is the perfect marriage proposal at a bucolic Vermont inn, but things do not go as planned.

programme.desc: Sparks fly between former best friends Austin and Everett as they reunite for a holiday treasure hunt.

programme.title: Flour Power: All About Eggs
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us the versatility of eggs by baking up some tasty, egg-centric desserts like Crème Brulee and Lemon Meringue Pie.

programme.title: Flour Power: Comfort Food
programme.desc: Baking host Jessica McGovern warms up the kitchen with some melty, creamy, and chewy treats to comfort you on a rainy day.

programme.title: Flour Power: Rich and Delicious
programme.desc: Baking is indulgent – especially when making rich and delicious treats! Host Jessica McGovern shares some foolproof recipes for all things rich.

programme.title: Flour Power: Desserts You Eat with Your Fingers
programme.desc: Small, fancy, and super scrumptious, host Jessica McGovern shows us how to make glorious desserts that you can eat with your fingers!

programme.title: Flour Power - Twists On The Classics
programme.desc: In a special filled with Gumdrop Cakes, Gingerbread Sticky Toffee Pudding, and an Eggnog Ski Slope Cake. Flour Power Christmas: Twists on the Classics, ensures your holiday treats will never be the same!

programme.title: Flour Power Special - Big Wow Desserts
programme.desc: From a decadent Chocolate Salted Caramel Yule Log to a whimsical Candy Cane Cake, host Jessica McGovern shows us how to celebrate a big holiday through big desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power Special - Birds and Bees
programme.desc: Inspired by chirping birds and buzzing bees, charming host Jessica McGovern bakes adorable desserts, including sweet and salty Bird's Nest Cookies and an over-the-top Honey Apricot Dessert Tower drizzled in sticky goodness.

programme.title: Flour Power Special - Coffee Klatch
programme.desc: In this sweet half-hour special, charming host Jessica McGovern pays tribute to this custom with three decadent and impressive desserts made with fragrant coffee.

programme.title: Flour Power Special - Edible Gifts
programme.desc: From crispy Brittle Bark to adorable Reindeer Cupcakes, Flour Power Christmas: Edible Gifts showcases delicious choices for a more personal present.

programme.title: Flour Power Special - Pie Galore

programme.desc: Charming host Jessica McGovern shows that spring showers bring decadent treats such as toasted hazelnut Mud Puddle Cookies and adorable Flower Pot Cupcakes that are sure to rejuvenate and bring new life to your kitchen!

programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred and Ethel overhear a fight between Ricky and Lucy...or did they? It seems Lucy is reading a murder mystery out loud to the amusement of Ricky. But when Ricky playfully throws the book at Lucy, she ends up with a black eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are out a restaurant and Lucy keeps changing her order and their seating. Ricky points out that she constantly changes her mind and never completes things.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' infant is cranky and keeps his parents as well as their neighbors up at night. When a neighbor, Mrs. Trumbull points out that the lease forbids children and threatens to move out along with other tenants.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are exhausted from walking the baby at night and hire a maid. Lucy prepares a list of dos and don'ts in order to set down the law for her new employee. However when Mrs. Porter arrives, she has her own list for her employer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to get into the act when Ricky is producing an Indian show at the Tropicana. Ricky instead hires the Mertzes to be part of the show, hoping Lucy will be cured of her show biz bug now that she is a mother.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky has planned a surprise party for Lucy's birthday and swears the Mertzes and all their friends to secrecy. Lucy, however, only knows that everyone has forgotten her birthday.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: An eligible bachelor is in town, and Lucy wants to set him up with a girlfriend of hers. The bachelor is a lingerie salesman by the name of Eddie Grant who is a friend of the Mertzes. Unfortunately, Lucy's attempts at matchmaking fail.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Without consulting Ricky, Lucy buys new living room furniture, using their old set as a down payment. Waiting for the right moment to tell Ricky the news, she hides the new furniture in the kitchen.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels that she and Ricky are growing apart because they don't share many of the same interests. To make up for this, Lucy decides to invite herself along to a camping trip that Ricky and Fred are going on.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Life magazine does a photo layout on the Ricardos and the only part of Lucy visible in the shot is her elbow. Lucy insists on getting a part in Ricky's act so that she can make a name for herself.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: A con man misleads the team during a murder investigation; Booth's younger brother, Jared, takes a job at the Pentagon; Brennan agrees to go on a date with Jared to a White House function.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: While en route to China to identify prehistoric anthropological remains, Booth and Brennan are called upon to solve a murder in midair when the flight attendant discovers a fully cooked human body in the plane's microwave.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate when a skull and other skeletal remains are found in a nationally protected wooded preserve; Brennan's recently acquitted father (Ryan O'Neal) finds a job as a teacher.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.desc: Ducky and Special Agent Bishop go to London to investigate when a case has a connection to one of Ducky's former friends.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigate a road accident that killed a Petty Officer while Gibbs tries to clear a Navy Hospital Corpsman accused of illegally providing medical aid to the victims of the crash.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When dozens of children from military families come down with a mysterious illness, the team tries to deliver a cure before the holidays.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When the city's internet is shut down three weeks before Christmas, the team consults with three imprisoned cyberterrorists.

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The final veteran artist's return sparks an old rivalry, the shops struggle to work together during a woodworking Flash Challenge, and artist Tommy Montoya is a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The six remaining shops must use their sales skills to win over the canvases for the chance to tattoo, and the judges send one more shop packing.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists create cohesive designs by painting nude models in the Flash Challenge, and some shops miss the mark on an Asian deity-themed Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The final four shops battle it out in a tattoo marathon for a spot in the finale, a chance at $200,000, and the first-ever title of Master Shop.

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The coaches face off to ensure the survival of their team, and proportion skills are put to the test when the artists must tattoo Greek deities.

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The coaches must lead by example when they're tasked to ink beneath the chin in the Flash Challenge, and the artists push the envelope with undead-style Elimination Tattoos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1997, una serie de crímenes en una pequeña comunidad agrícola de Iowa dejó a los residentes sorprendidos y aterrados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los ochenta, las importaciones de cocaína en Florida estaban entre las más altas del país. El homicidio y la intimidación se impusieron en los territorios.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Kokomo, Indiana, un crimen impensable aterrorizó a los residentes. Una mujer fue secuestrada de su casa una clara mañana de primavera.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1997, un triple homicidio aterrorizó a los residentes de la capital del país. En un café en Georgetown, tres empleados fueron asesinados por disparos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1986, la pequeña ciudad sin crímenes de Indiana se tornó violenta por la llegada de un extraño muy peligroso. Después de que un oficial fuera baleado a quemarropa, el asesino psicótico llevó a los investigadores a través del Medio Oeste.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Langley, Virginia, un terrorista dispara un arma al tráfico en hora pico. Las víctimas parecían elegidas al azar, pero el motivo podría ser político y apunta a los empleados de la Agencia Central de Inteligencia.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El día antes de Acción de Gracias, una madre descubrió que su hijo de 10 años había desaparecido de la escuela. Nadie sabía cómo podía haber sucedido. En pocas horas, toda la familia del niño estaba desesperada buscándolo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una tarde de verano en la lujosa Lodi, California, una niña de doce años es secuestrada de su casa. Muchos oficiales de policía y agentes del FBI se reunieron, determinados a encontrar a la pequeña antes de que fuera demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En la Texas rural, una niña de trece años es secuestrada de camino a la escuela. Desesperado por encontrarla a salvo, su padre millonario contacta a las autoridades locales y al FBI.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En septiembre de 1997, un equipo de hombres cubiertos con máscaras asaltó una instalación de autos blindados en Los Ángeles, y escaparon con 18,9 millones de dólares, el mayor golpe en la historia de robos de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1996, dos hombres entraron en una casa de empeño en Birmingham, Alabama, y asesinaron sin piedad a los empleados. Para desconocimiento de los asesinos, una cámara secreta de vigilancia grabó el tiroteo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el condado Lincoln, Nebraska, un traficante de drogas fugitivo se involucró en un tiroteo con policías, hiriendo a dos de ellos, y evitó la captura después de una persecución a alta velocidad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Después de que un criminal con trayectoria cometiera un homicidio vehicular en Nueva Orleans, los agentes del FBI lo rastrearon por medio de sus hábitos y adicciones.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los años ochenta, un par de ladrones en serie de bancos ganaron reputación entre las fuerzas de la ley como bandidos formidables.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra seizes control of the G.I. Joe space shuttle, using the shuttle and a series of relay cubes to create a pyramid-like “zone” no vehicle or machine can function in.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Shipwreck and Snake Eyes continue to evade capture in an effort to get back to the Joe team with vital data about Cobra's control cubes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra plots to attack the cities of the world with lava flow when they kidnap Dr. Shakur and bring him to their jungle base, planning to use his breakthrough technology to harness the energy of Earth's core and cause volcanic eruptions.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Zartan, disguised as a notable French scientist, infiltrates the worldwide defense center on a mission to destroy the facility for Cobra. He's planted a bomb, and now the clock is ticking… can the Joe team find and defuse the bomb before it's too late?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.desc: Flint, Bazooka, and the others have to fight their way through a deadly Cobra temple to reach a group of brilliant scientists whom Cobra has kidnapped. As the Joes try to navigate the deadly maze, they find there is nothing fun about this funhouse!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the various jewels at the World Fair in Los Angeles. Lupin learns from Fujiko that a man named Harry Satler is also after the jewels, so he decides to go see who this guy is. The man he meets is a wizened old man…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Pestered by Fujiko, Lupin has to steal a golden bed that was originally made by Louis XIV for Josephine. He makes a plan with Jigen and Goemon, but the owner of the bed, Morgan, is a formidable opponent who has WWII military experience.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Heike Clan and Minamoto Clan once battled on Devil's Head Island at the inland sea of Seto; Fujiko and Lupin go there to find out about the details behind the legend of the battle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vivian dreams of becoming a star some day, but her auditions are a bust. She thinks of using Lupin to become famous; she makes Lupin engage in thievery, and informs reporters to be at the site to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Catherine rescues Lupin and Jigen, who are pursued by Zenigata as usual. She's an old acquaintance of Jigen's, and provokes Jigen to steal a 140-karat diamond from her own mansion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Wolf and Rose are a cool hitmen duo with the ambition of rising to the top of the hitman business by killing Lupin. They capture Goemon and torture him to confess about Lupin's weaknesses. Lupin learns that Goemon is in danger.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The chief of the police department accused of mismanagement on Lupin's release, hit the prime minister out of anger and was dismissed. Zenigata thinks that Lupin is the only arrest to avenge the chief's death, and starts an operation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The painting "The First Supper" hides clues to an heirloom that Christ received from Virgin Mary. This painting has been kept by the clan of Judah for generations, and a woman named Nova knows where the painting is hidden.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Mona Lisa never leaves the Louvre Museum. Arsène Lupin tried unsuccessfully to steal her and Lupin III wants her for his collection, however, and fireworks ignite between him and Zenigata in charge of security.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Lupin is after is the Golden Treasure Ship at Mount Horai. It's said that the Seven Lucky Gods conferred this treasure, which is shown in public only once a year when the New Year's bell rings at the belfry of Kohoji Temple.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Lupin is tossed to and fro by Fujiko. But a man named Buckingham comes to him and sells him "disguise chewing gum" for 50,000 dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The island of Rabaul has many remains of Japanese casualties of the Pacific War. It's said that Captain Cook's secret treasure is hidden there, worth 1-billion pounds. Lupin and gang are after this treasure but they get attacked!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and gang break into the Bank of Stockholm but as usual, Fujiko tries to take the money all for herself. Lupin goes after her but she gets injured in an avalanche. She confesses to Lupin about the location of her most precious treasure…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends search a month for the pirate Kid's treasure, but they are thwarted by an underground organization called the Red Ghost. Knowing something is afoot, Lupin sends Fujiko and Goemon to investigate.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds a piece of paper in a silk hat, an heirloom of Arsène Lupin. It's information regarding an opal statue of Venus, and since Lupin figures its ownership is his birthright, he heads to Gregoire's castle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata acquires a pie-throwing gun, and is ordered to capture Lupin. Meanwhile, Lupin and Fujiko are discussing Napoleon's treasures. It's said that the key to solving the mystery of their whereabouts lies in a scarf made by Napoleon's assistant…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The young girl Francoise lives near Lupin; she watches Lupin and Fujiko talking, and falls for him. But her father scolds her and tells her to stay away from thieves, but Francoise devises a plan to approach Lupin anyway…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Professor Pancho has devoted his life to solving the problem of food supply. Lupin decides to help them out and invents a rocket that flies on corn fuel, thinking that maybe he and Fujiko will take a trip to the moon…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is blackmailed; Fujiko has been kidnapped, and for ransom he must steal a jeweled crown worth 100 million dollars. Lupin and friends head to the museum where their objective lies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lady Black and Fujiko have a bet. Whoever kills Lupin will get the loser's entire jewelry collection. Lady Black lures Lupin using Fujiko so she could kill him, but why is she so passionate about wanting him dead?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Boss Largo wants Lupin dead; Lupin had just stolen a bundle of the boss's casino profits. But no run of the mill hitman would suffice to wack Lupin. But Largo sees that Lupin is suffering from a toothache, and gets an idea.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin reads the morning paper, which says that Lupin stole a 100-karat diamond that was being used in a musical. He knows he didn't do it, so he asks Fujiko and others, but they too have no idea what it's all about.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The nation of Janaica is troubled with coup d'etats and revolutions, but Lupin, discovering that the president's mansion houses the missing painting "Nude Venus," decides to go scope the joint with Jigen.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Fernando está en crisis, peleado y distanciado de todos, incluso sus amigos de Acapulco Shore. Ya ha tenido cruces con Potro, Abraham, Igor, Mane y Esteban. Mientras tanto Electra y Esteban deberán trabajar juntos en el bar de la playa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega una sorpresa enorme para Potro que lo pondrá en jaque y en un triángulo amoroso en el que no esperaba estar. Y el resto de la casa sigue tenso aún con la partida de Fernando.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La costa del sol se ve conmocionada por el arribo de Karime y Labrador que se integran con todo a la fiesta de los Súper Shore, mientras tanto en la casa Arantxa y Mane le tienden una trampa a Talía, la operación pez se pone en marcha.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos revivirán los mejores momentos de los primeros 10 episodios de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Pero cuidado que esto aún no termina, todavía faltan los últimos tres episodios de Súper Shore 2.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La primera noche de Karime y Labrador en la casa se celebra con una grandiosa fiesta en la que Cañete es víctima de Karime. Para salir de la dinámica de fiestas y chiringuitos de playa, los chicos planean irse de acampada.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de Arantxa se convierte en el acontecimiento del verano. Las sorpresas y las celebraciones se prolongan durante varios días de divertidísimas fiestas.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todo lo que empieza tiene que terminar y así pasa con estas vacaciones en las costas del mediterráneo. Llega la hora en que los chicos de Súper Shore deberán de despedirse.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos repasan los mejores momentos de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Ellos verán las mejores fiestas, las peleas, los momentos más importantes de sus vacaciones y lo que eso conlleva

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Nuevas vacaciones comienzan para la familia más disfuncional. Serán en Rimini, Italia la tierra de la matadora de Italia, Elettra.El primer episodio sorprende a los Shores con muchos cambios dentro de la familia y con una casa espectacular.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todo parece indicar que el desmadre este año lo empiezan a poner los nuevos discípulos. Victor trata de seducir a Elettra, Isaac juega con Adela para ver quien tiene el control y Ferre tontea todo el tiempo seduciendo a Eva hasta que se pelean.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega el boss, es italiano y tiene carácter, comienza regañándolos y los envía a trabajar crudos. Isaac está de cumpleaños y recibe muchos regalos, incluido el de Adela. Elettra come una pizza que la pone cachonda. Una gran alegría llega a Rimini.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Hay tensión en la casa, Adela está de malas con Elettra que no entiende cual es el problema, pero el problema es que ella se está ligando a Isaac adelante e Adela y a este parece no importarle.Victor y Potro se dicen sus verdades.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Karime y Elettra arman un plan para ligarse a Ferre y a Isaac delante de Adela y Eva porque no les gusta su actitud irrespetuosa, estas dos están un poco sorprendidas por lo que pasa y no saben bien como enfrentarlo.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones van a tope para todos menos para Eva que parece no disfrutar lo que está viviendo, ni la llegada de su amigo Pietro logra sacarle el mood negativo a la francesa de fuego. Al mismo tiempo la casa está en shock por un chisme.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When it’s discovered that a multimillionaire’s suicide is actually murder, Rick Stafford, the nephew recently cut out of his uncle’s will, is the #1 suspect. However, Matlock suspects other players in this high-stakes game of foul play

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Even though her former husband was a liar and a cheat, Leanne Matlock refuses to believe he was capable of murdering his philandering boss.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When testifying as a witness in a robbery case, Matlock is made to look like a fool. It soon becomes apparent that someone is playing tricks on him that threaten his credibility and safety.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock is disturbed by frightening dreams that apparently give him clues to the murder of a doctor at a clinic patronized by celebrities. He even begins to wonder if he’s psychic.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: It’s War of The Roses, Freudian style as divorcing psychiatrists forsake their couches for the courtroom. Matlock gets caught in the middle of a brutal battle that bruises more than egos.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock upjocks the secret of a young piano student’s supposed suicide and discovers the keys to her death are jealousy, adultery, and blind ambition when a piano competition becomes more than just a musical affair.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ignoring her father’s warnings, Leanne Mcintyre agrees to defend charismatic philanthropist Gil Stoddard, accused of brutally murdering his business partner.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Viewing a heated argument from his hotel window, Matlock witnesses a murder involving two stars of a local theater production and an unhappy husband. When he helps investigate the case, his memory becomes a bit blurred.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Director of an amateur stage production, Doug Michaels fires would-be actor Ben Matlock from his role as a detective, claiming he’s seen kumquats with more talent. However, the tables soon turn when Michaels is accused of murdering the leading lady.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Unraveling the clues to a series of suspicious deaths, Matlock uncovers a greedy extortion business that’s turned quite nasty. Ben and Leanne are drawn into a case of three accidental deaths.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock and his daughter Leanne discover that extortion is the key to three accidental deaths. involving young women who make it a business of crying rape.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: Hay áreas misteriosas alrededor del mundo donde los aviones, barcos y personas parecen desaparecer sin dejar rastro.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: A lo largo de todo Estados Unidos existen millones de cementerios rurales. Algunos están muy mal identificados y, con el paso del tiempo, pueden ser olvidados con facilidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños recurrentes constituyen la manera en la que nuestra mente lidia con los problemas que debemos resolver. Pero ¿qué ocurre cuando la vida comienza a imitar los miedos más temibles del subconsciente?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Todos tenemos secretos. Algunos de nosotros les ocultamos cosas a nuestros amigos para evitar la vergüenza. Otros, se las ocultamos a nuestros seres queridos porque tenemos el temor de que estropeen la imagen que tienen de nosotros.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los nuevos comienzos son siempre emocionantes. Pero sin importar cuánto deseemos que ocurran, siempre llegan con cierto grado de ansiedad y dificultad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños son vitales. Palpitan en nuestros corazones, resuenan en nuestras mentes, nos impulsan hacia adelante hasta que convertimos nuestra imaginación en acción y damos aliento a nuestros destinos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El hogar debería ser un remanso de solaz, un refugio de los males externos. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando un terror paranormal lo invade, y el hogar se convierte en una prisión?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La fe es una fuerza poderosa. Puede proporcionar fuerza a los débiles, puede calmar los mares más tempestuosos. Pero, para la mayoría de las personas, la fe brinda respuestas que pueden ayudar a darle sentido a un mundo caótico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La infancia debería ser una etapa de descubrimiento lúdico y de regocijo inocente. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando las realidades del reino paranormal traspasan sus barreras y despiertan el mal verdadero?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los investigadores paranormales buscan comprender lo sobrenatural y, con frecuencia, utilizan su conocimiento para ayudar a los demás. Pero ¿qué ocurre con estos expertos cuando el objeto de sus estudios se pone contra ellos?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Incluso los lugares más inofensivos pueden guardar las cicatrices de un pasado retorcido. El mal puede perdurar a través del tiempo, puede permanecer latente hasta que alguna persona ingenua o algún inocente se crucen en su camino sin darse cuenta.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El nacimiento y la muerte son etapas naturales de la vida. Sin embargo, algunas veces la muerte no es el capítulo final. A menudo, espíritus inquietos deambulan por la tierra buscando atormentar con su furia eterna a los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ayudar a los amigos a sobrellevar los tiempos difíciles puede ser agotador, en especial cuando esa dificultad tiene que ver con una enfermedad que pone en peligro la vida.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuenta la leyenda que un "fantasma" empujará a cualquiera que se atreva a sentarse en lo alto del mausoleo en el cementerio más antiguo de Wisconsin. Los compañeros de secundaria Nick, Krystian y Jon prueban esta teoría en la noche de Halloween.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji prepare to do battle on behalf of Boss the Beetle, but Captain Largo of the Amigo Pirates counters with a deadly arsenal of nets to put the Straw Hat brawlers on lock down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks into Second Gear for his rematch with Largo, and Nami leads the islanders as they lay waste to the Amigo Pirates. Boss the Beetle may be safe for now, but someone sinister lurks behind the scenes.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to stay a step ahead of a prison patrol made up of hungry lions and poisonous scorpions! Meanwhile, Ace spends what could be his final hours swapping stories with a pirate who hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the guards struggle to squelch a violent prison uprising, Luffy and his fellow fugitives try to keep their cool in a level of Impel Down known as Starvation Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock uses her ample assets to buy some private time for a clandestine chat with Ace. Meanwhile, Luffy needs help from a graceful friend to escape the jaws of a hungry Sphinx!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Bon are on the verge of reaching Level 4, but they didn't count on fighting a demonic, lightning-fast, devastatingly powerful Minotaur! To defeat this beast, they'll need help from a human candle and a deranged clown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy narrowly avoids a deadly dip in the boiling pool of blood, only to find himself face to face with Warden Magellan. Meanwhile, outside the prison walls, the marine fleet prepares for Whitebeard's onslaught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Warden Magellan is a monster of a man with a penchant for poisoning prisoners. To rescue Ace, Luffy must go toe to toe with this toxic terror, but how do you defeat a foe who's deadly to the touch?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's daring assault on the venomous warden of Impel Down leaves him struggling to stand up, but despite the lethal poison breaking down his body, the rubber-man kicks his rescue mission into Second Gear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy hovers perilously on the verge of death, Bon Clay embarks on a suicidal rescue mission plagued by sub-zero temperatures and bloodthirsty wolves with a supremely savage disposition!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: No existing antidote can save Luffy from the poison coursing through his veins, yet Bon Clay refuses to give up. His final, fleeting hope is a mysterious miracle-worker rumored to have vanished into the Gates of Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bon is overjoyed to hear that Luffy is still alive, but his happiness quickly turns to shock when he learns that Ivan's agonizingly painful "Healing Hormones" will cost the rubber-man ten years of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is scheduled to be executed in a matter of hours, and Luffy's still hovering on the verge of death. It will take a miracle to save them both, but Bon would rather die than give up on his friend!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy miraculously survived his brush with death, but he's far too weak to finish rescuing Ace. Ivan is reluctant to lend a hormonal hand to the doomed rescue mission – until he learns of Luffy's lineage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The quest to rescue Ace tuckers out thanks to a blast of sleeping gas! Ivan's scissor-handed sidekick puts an end to nap time, but Luffy will have to join forces with a scar-faced foe from the past if he wants to complete his mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's desperate attempt to rescue Ace is bolstered by two powerful new allies: the murderous Crocodile and the honorable fishman Jinbei. Meanwhile, Ivan sparks a prison riot to create a diversion for the rubber-man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang of outlaws cause a commotion on Level Four, Blackbeard's arrival leads to the release of the prison's most feared inmate, and Ace gazes upon the great blue sky for what could be the very last time!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ivan undergoes a curvaceous transformation to better battle sadistic Sadie, the commander of the Demon Guards. Meanwhile, Blackbeard and Shiryu head for a showdown on Level 1!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's bone-crushing battle with the Vice Warden of Impel Down is interrupted by the sudden appearance of Blackbeard. When the rubber-man hears what the warlord has to say – heads will roll!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Even in Second Gear, Luffy is no match for Blackbeard's vortex, but the rubber-man rebounds by knocking out a Demon Guard with one ferocious pistol-punch. Elsewhere, Warden Magellan vows to finish Luffy once and for all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is to be executed in a matter of hours, and Magellan's toxic breath is singeing the back of Luffy's neck. Ivan uses a devastating Death Wink to buy some time, but the warden's Poison Hydra may be more than he can handle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy dons a suit of waxy armor in preparation for his rematch with Warden Magellan. Outside the prison walls, Jimbei turns a door into a boat, so Crocodile and Buggy can commandeer an escape vessel!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Magellan takes his toxic attack to the next level by unleashing the hideous and deadly Venom Demon! If Jimbei and Crocodile don't return with a rescue ship soon, Luffy won't survive long enough to save Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his merry band of escapees are safely onboard the rescue ship, but they're not out of hot water just yet. A fleet of marines is bombarding them with cannon balls, and an impenetrable gate looms on the horizon!
